title: test_health_check_endpoint_returns_status_ok
description: Verify that GET /api/health returns a 200 status code with a JSON body containing {"status":"ok"} indicating the service is healthy.

title: test_v1_generate_skill_with_valid_content
description: Test POST /api/v1/generate-skill with valid creator_content of at least 40 characters and optional parameters, expecting a 200 response with GenerateSkillResponse including skill_name and zip path.

title: test_v1_generate_skill_with_short_content
description: Test POST /api/v1/generate-skill with creator_content shorter than 40 characters, expecting a 422 Pydantic validation error indicating string_too_short.

title: test_v2_generate_skill_twitter_with_valid_username_and_token
description: Test POST /api/v2/generate-skill/twitter with a valid twitter_username and configured X_BEARER_TOKEN, expecting a 200 response with GenerateSkillResponse including skill_name and source_metadata.

title: test_v2_generate_skill_twitter_without_bearer_token
description: Test POST /api/v2/generate-skill/twitter with a valid twitter_username but without X_BEARER_TOKEN configured, expecting a 400 error indicating token not configured or no tweets found.

title: test_v2_generate_skill_youtube_with_valid_urls
description: Test POST /api/v2/generate-skill/youtube with a list of valid YouTube URLs, expecting a 200 response with GenerateSkillResponse including skill_name, source_metadata, and possible warnings for partial transcripts.

title: test_v2_generate_skill_youtube_with_empty_url_list
description: Test POST /api/v2/generate-skill/youtube with an empty list of youtube_urls, expecting a 422 Pydantic validation error due to minimum items constraint.

title: test_get_skill_detail_for_existing_skill
description: Test GET /api/v1/skills/{skill_name} for an existing skill, expecting a 200 response with SkillDetail including files and their contents.

title: test_delete_skill_and_verify_removal
description: Test DELETE /api/v1/skills/{skill_name} to delete a skill, expecting a 200 confirmation, and subsequent GET /api/v1/skills/{skill_name} returns 404 indicating skill not found.

title: test_export_single_file_with_path_traversal_attempt
description: Test GET /api/v1/export/{skill_name}/{file_path} with a file_path containing '..' to verify the middleware blocks path traversal attempts and returns a 400 Invalid path error.
